entities.mug: a coffee mug among the books

scenes.title: The Bookshelf
scenes.background_prompt: A home office with a tall wooden bookshelf against the wall, a desk with a lamp, a leather chair, and framed photos on the wall. No objects on the shelves.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A home office with soft lighting. A tall wooden bookshelf stands against the wall, its shelves neatly organized. On the middle shelf, a thick red hardcover book with gold lettering on the spine stands between a blue book of similar size and a slim green paperback. Wedged between the blue and green books, a white ceramic coffee mug with a brown coffee ring stain inside sits on the shelf among the books, clearly out of place in a row of literature. A wooden desk with a brass lamp and a notebook sits to the left. A leather reading chair with a plaid blanket draped over the arm faces the bookshelf. Framed photographs hang on the wall above the desk.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place book_1 on the middle shelf (left), standing upright. Place book_2 next to it (center). Place book_3 next to book_2 (right). Place mug wedged between book_2 and book_3 on the shelf, clearly out of place.
scenes.scene_description: In this children's picture-book scene, the room features a light green wall on the left adorned with four framed pictures of various shapes and sizes depicting landscapes and abstract art. A large, five-tier wooden bookshelf stands against the center wall. On its third shelf from the top, from left to right, are book_1, which is red, book_2, which is blue, a brown mug with a handle, and book_3, which is green; the remaining shelves are empty. To the right of the bookshelf, four more framed pictures are hung on the green wall, including an oval landscape and several square frames. The floor is composed of light brown wooden planks, partially covered by a large rug with a green border, yellow triangular patterns, and a central yellow diamond with a light blue square. A dark brown leather armchair with a buttoned cushion sits on the rug, positioned next to a wooden desk. On the desk sits a brass-colored desk lamp with a glowing yellow bulb. To the right, a large four-pane window with a wooden frame looks out onto a sunny daytime landscape. The view through the window includes two large green trees, rolling green hills, and a grassy field filled with small white and yellow flowers under a light blue sky with white clouds.
